name: NBHD Agenda Tools
description: Agent-facing tools for recording future-aware commitments to follow up with the user. Phase D of the agenda-aware assistant arc — the agent writes notes to itself that the platform surfaces back at well-chosen moments, not exact-time alarms.

apiBaseUrl.description: Override NBHD API base URL. Defaults to NBHD_API_BASE_URL env var.

tenantId.description: Override tenant ID. Defaults to NBHD_TENANT_ID env var.

internalApiKey.description: Override internal API key. Defaults to NBHD_INTERNAL_API_KEY env var.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for runtime endpoint requests.
